question: Bitcoin price range on Apr 8, 2026?
reasoning: Bitcoin needs to increase 13-15% (~$9,000-$10,000) in roughly 30 hours to reach $78,250. Current price around $68,400 faces significant headwinds: extreme fear sentiment (Fear & Greed Index at 11), range-bound trading since February between $62K-$75K, and geopolitical tensions. While Bitcoin briefly touched $70,000 on ceasefire reports, sustained moves above $75,000 resistance have failed repeatedly. Daily volatility averages 2.17% recently, making a 13%+ move within one day unlikely despite theoretical GARCH volatility of 39%.
key_factors: Recent failed attempts to break $75,000 resistance
risks: Sudden positive news catalyst could trigger large moves
Low liquidity during specific hours could cause price spikes
Geopolitical resolution could spark risk-on sentiment
Institutional buying could create rapid price acceleration
